name: UV Shield Aviator Sunglasses
description: Iconic aviator silhouette with 100% UV400 protection lenses. Lightweight titanium frame, polarized gradient lenses. Perfect for beach days, road trips, and festival season.

name: Tropical Breeze Sundress
description: Flowy midi sundress featuring hand-painted tropical floral print. Breathable 100% organic cotton with adjustable spaghetti straps and a relaxed, bohemian silhouette.

name: AquaShield SPF 50+ Sunscreen
description: Reef-safe, water-resistant SPF 50+ broad-spectrum sunscreen. Lightweight gel formula, non-greasy finish, suitable for all skin types. Infused with Aloe Vera and Vitamin E.

name: Paradise Cove Beach Tote
description: XL woven straw tote with nautical rope handles and an inner waterproof liner. Fits a beach towel, sunscreen, snacks, and more. Comes with a detachable zipper pouch.

name: Ocean Rush Surf Shorts
description: Quick-dry board shorts with a 4-way stretch fabric, secure zip pocket, and retro sunset print. UPF 40+ sun protection. Ideal for surfing, swimming, or casual summer wear.

name: Golden Hour Face Mist
description: Refreshing facial mist with hyaluronic acid and rose water to keep skin hydrated and glowing all day. Doubles as a makeup setting spray with a cooling sensation.

name: Sunset Stripe Bikini Set
description: Color-block bikini set with adjustable halter top and high-waisted bottoms. Made from recycled ocean nylon. Provides excellent support with removable padding.

name: Island Drift Flip Flops
description: Ergonomic cushioned flip flops with memory foam footbed and non-slip rubber outsole. Waterproof and odor-resistant. Available in 6 vibrant summer colors.
